Video.summary: Celebrities take to the arena, teaming up with veterans from the series and their robots. The celebrities must control the robots for at least 60 seconds before the professionals can take over.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Video.summary: The wars begin yet again, competitors can only qualify by destroying or outsmarting their opponents, and doing their best to stay out of the house robots way. Sumo and Pinball Warrior will test the robots grit and accuracy.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Hypno-Disc

Video.summary: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Razer

Video.summary: An apparent malfunction gives a veteran competitor an opportunity to redeem themselves in the eliminators. The World Champion returns to take on the Pinball Warrior.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: Sparks fly in this week’s heat as competitors put their weapons to good use and a robot uses its shape to their advantage.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: The eliminator begins slowly, but as the battle heats up the robots must stay cool, or they might end up losing their head. The house robots see one of their busiest nights in the arena as they try to keep up.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Initially released on VHS and broadcast on TV a year later, the World Championship featured sixteen robots from eleven different countries. A straight knockout competition would decide which robot would be known as the World Champion.
Video.title: The Third Wars - First World Championship

Image.alt: The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship

Video.summary: Six competitors, including World Champion Razer battle it out for a shot at the Fourth Wars title. Irreparable damage could mean the permanent end of one of the veteran competitors in the semi-finals.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: A competitor faces issues before the battle even begins in this week’s eliminators and the house robots stand by, ready to strike the final blow. The clock proves to be the enemy in this week’s Pinball Warrior, and the competitors prepare to stand their ground in Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: Veterans and Newcomers once again face the eliminators and Dead Metal tries to make a friend. A house robot gets flipped, causing the others to go on a rampage. A uniquely designed robot takes on Pinball Warrior and two more competitors stare down Shunt in Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: A single strike spells trouble for a robot in the eliminators. A fleeting alliance forms as competitor and house robot team up to make an offering to the pit. This week’s Pinball Warrior has high-hopes for a standout performance.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: A robot with a unique strategy takes part in this week’s heat. Is it a recipe for success, or a fancy gimmick? The house robot’s manners are at an all-time low as they continue to attack after cease is called.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: The robots take the term “facing off” literally this week as they rip each other apart. Will Shunt manage to shake off the competitors in this week’s Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: The heat descends into chaos as the house robots team up to take down the competitors. The judges make a controversial decision in the final to decide this week’s winner.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Over halfway through the heats and the hopefuls are still lining up to put their robots through mechanical hell, for a chance of making it to the semi-finals.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: We see more teams from around the UK bringing in their unique, sometimes amusing, sometimes terrifying robots to battle against each other. Sergeant Bash’s flamethrower is put to good use in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Walker Battle returns as the contestants for this week’s special prepare to put their best foot forward against the other legged robots. A competitor makes the house robots sweat in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Pinball Warrior is back for the eighth time this series and the heats are nearing their end. One of the competitors uses its speed to great effect.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: The penultimate Pinball Warrior run is this week. The house robots risk their own metal to attack the competitors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat O

Video.summary: The last heats of The Third Wars, as the finals approach, desperation grows among the competitors to secure a place in the finals. As well as the final heat, this episode features the final Pinball Warrior run of the third series.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat P

Video.summary: Karma comes for one of the competitors as the Semi-Finals commence in spectacular fashion. There are no specials this week as the knockout battles take priority in deciding who will win the crown.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: More heat winners are pitted against each other in knockout competition. The robots attempt to ram, flip and burn their way to the finals, all while trying to avoid the house robots.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: This is what it’s been building up to, The Grand Final is here. Which of the successful semi-finalists will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The Third Wars?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: The sixth Pinball warrior run introduces another competitor to test their skills against the targets, and the house robots. In the knockouts, the house robots are being exploited as the competitors over-crowd the CPZ zones.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat K
